gemm.task_command: cd speed_test/cuda_ops && mkdir -p build && cd build && rm -rf * && cmake -DCUDNN_INCLUDE_DIR=/opt/conda/lib/python3.11/site-packages/nvidia/cudnn/include -DCUDNN_LIBRARIES=/opt/conda/lib/python3.11/site-packages/nvidia/cudnn/lib/libcudnn.so.9  .. && make && cd ../../ && python test_gemm.py gemm_f16.csv 16 0
